display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official Launchpad project name are pbzip2.
docs_sources: source_facts.source-archive is hosted under Launchpad; Launchpad project page is the official documentation and release surface.
repo_sources: Official Launchpad pbzip2 page lists Code as lp:pbzip2 with Bazaar version control.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Parallel bzip2; official Launchpad overview describes pthreads and compatibility with bzip2.
